action_schema.description: Agent's processed output to submit at each step.

records.description: Tasks 1-3: List of processed PatientRecord objects (matching input schema).

knowledge.description: Task 4 only: List of knowledge objects with 'entities' and 'summary'.

is_final.description: Set true to signal final submission and end the episode early.

tasks.name: Data Hygiene & Standardisation
tasks.description: Fix messy EHR records: normalise dates to ISO 8601, standardise medication units, replace invalid ICD-10 codes, and populate missing required fields.

tasks.name: PHI Detection & Redaction
tasks.description: Replace all Protected Health Information with typed redaction tokens ([REDACTED_NAME], [REDACTED_MRN], ...) while preserving all clinical content.

tasks.name: Full Anonymisation + Downstream Utility
tasks.description: Fully de-identify records while preserving enough clinical signal for a deterministic disease-risk model to remain accurate. Use age-group buckets, preserve ICD-10 chapter prefixes, etc.

tasks.name: Clinical Knowledge Extraction
tasks.description: Extract clinical entities (diseases, treatments, labs), standardize to ICD-10-CM codes, and generate a concise narrative summary of the patient's clinical state. Submit one knowledge object per input record, in the same order as observation.records (knowledge items have no record_id; alignment is by index).

tasks.name: Contextual PII Disambiguation
tasks.description: Decide which mentions in clinical notes are patient identifiers vs. providers/facilities/family. Redact only patient PII, keep providers.
